# Migration file/row drift baseline — p224 (2026-05-22)
#
# Versions present in supabase_migrations.schema_migrations
# but WITHOUT a corresponding local .sql file.
#
# Discovery: WATCH-AUDIT-HIGH-17 (P162 log #185) → δ Hybrid amnesty + ratchet
# decision (ADR-0097). 694 entries at p224 baseline.
#
# Risk: functional = NONE today (live DB has DDL applied; contract tests pass).
# Surfaces only on `supabase db reset` rebuild from local files.
#
# Going forward: GC-097 protocol prevents new entries.
# Ratchet via tests/contracts/rpc-migration-coverage.test.mjs.
#
# Ratchet DOWN: capture missing version into a local .sql + bump baseline.
# Ratchet UP: prohibited without PM ack + ADR update + baseline bump.
